$comment: c11 D-CSUBSET-EAST-CONST-CAST: an east-const cast `(unsigned char const *)` (const between the base type and the stars — the SQLite-pervasive pointer-to-const cast) parses + derefs → exit 42. The cast-type grammar (castTypeRef) gained a post-base ConstKeyword slot, mirroring the declaration head; the const resolver ignores const for type identity so it is a grammar-only change. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop the post-base optional ConstKeyword and `(unsigned char const *)` fails to parse (P0009). The pe arm RUNS on the windows leg (native witness); elf/macho/arm64 on the linux/darwin/qemu legs; the release arm witnesses the optimizer over the cast.
